Tweet by @RampLabs (Ramp Labs)
Author bio: 
Text: We built a codebase that maintains itself.

An agent instruments every pull request, triages alerts, and pushes fixes autonomously. The system runs on a thousand AI-generated monitors, one for every 75 lines of code. https://t.co/bLnX9cJZQl
